title: Security: [maglev] VisitSwitchOnGeneratorState function  JumpTableTargetOffsets can be  0
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
the bug occur in the maglev phase. which can be exploited lead to RCE  
  
**VERSION**   
Chrome Version: dev  
Operating System: ubuntu20.04 tls x64  
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**   
compile debug version v8 with maglev engable,    
run the command line:  
./d8  --expose
